title: Beautiful Potions [MOD EDITION]
description: This mod transforms the visual experience of potions, enhancing every detail with vibrant textures and unique designs!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Beautiful_Potions/BH_Beautiful_Potions_header2.webp) This mod changes the appearance of potions, including both vanilla ones and many added by popular mods. For a long time, the Minecraft community has wanted potions to have more distinctive and recognizable designs. This mod aims to improve their visuals by giving each potion its own unique bottle and style. The textures have been redesigned to be more colorful, clearer, and more visually appealing, making potions stand out and easier to identify at a glance. Previously, we had released a resourcepack, but since the first version, we have received countless requests to transform it into a mod, and without requiring any other mod to work... Well, it is now available! This mod does NOT require any other mod to modify the look of the potions!
We have also added support for over 31 mods, including: Alex's Mobs, Apothic Atribbutes, Apotheosis, Ars Elemental, Ars Noveau, Autumnity, Ben' Sharks, Buzzier Bees, Corail Tombstone, Crabber's Delight, Deep Aether, Deeper and Darker, Ecologics, Eternal Starlight, Friends & Foes, Goblin Traders, Hybrid Aquatic, Illager Invasion, Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks, Kobolds, Mowzie's Mobs, Mutant Monster, Occultism, PotionsMaster, Stalwart Dungeons, Supplementaries, The Bumblezone, The Undergarden, Untitled Duck, Upgrade Aquatic and Yung's Cave Biomes.
### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Beautiful_Potions/BH_Beautiful_Potions_description.webp) The goal of Beautiful Potions is simple: to transform Minecraft potions into a visual spectacle, replacing their standard bottles with varied, thematic designs that enhance their charm. Each potion will feature a bottle style and color scheme tailored to its specific effect, along with unique details that make them stand out even more. We’re confident you’ll love these stunning new designs! ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Beautiful_Potions/BH_Beautiful_Potions_faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Beautiful_Potions/BH_Beautiful_Potions_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1W3D7TU2/images/f2cceac858a259f739aac69a4a926ac8ae5a8ef2.png) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1W3D7TU2/images/0400d3129fc4f6f0a376ff020797fce015da2d45.png) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1W3D7TU2/images/0465440128765d5b9792892eb04968b0e13c3e7f.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
